# blastshield_event_log_rule (Resource)

Manages a Blastshield event_log_rule.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "blastshield_event_log_rule" "failed_auth" {
  name    = "alert-on-failed-auth"
  enabled = true

  conditions = [
    {
      condition_type = "category"
      operator       = "eq"
      value          = "auth"
    }
  ]

  actions          = ["email-notification"]
  email_recipients = ["security@example.com"]
  apply_to_groups  = [blastshield_group.web_servers.id]

  tags = {
    team = "security"
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `actions` (Set of String)
- `apply_to_groups` (Set of Number)
- `conditions` (Attributes Set) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--conditions))
- `enabled` (Boolean)
- `name` (String)

### Optional

- `email_recipients` (Set of String)
- `tags` (Map of String)

### Read-Only

- `id` (Number) The ID of this resource.
- `system_tags` (Map of String)

<a id="nestedatt--conditions"></a>
### Nested Schema for `conditions`

Required:

- `condition_type` (String)
- `operator` (String)
- `value` (String)
